summary: Form builder project with multilingual support including Jharkhand local languages, Hindi, English, and Bangla.
architectural_notes: Language support must include Jharkhand local languages, Hindi, English, and Bangla
known_issues: Language section was unintentionally modified; originally included Jharkhand local languages, Hindi, English, and Bangla

existing_features.title: Restore the preferred languages multi-select options in Step 3 (Basic Details) to include all Jharkhand local languages (e.g., Santali, Mundari, Ho, Kurukh/Oraon, Nagpuri, Khortha, Kurmali, Panch Pargania) along with Hindi, English, and Bangla — exactly as they existed before the unintentional modification.
Update the LanguageSwitcher component and i18n translation files to add Bangla (Bengali) as a supported UI language alongside the existing English and Hindi options.

new_feature_requests.summary: Restore language section to include Jharkhand local languages along with Hindi, English, and Bangla

projectName: Restore language options to include Jharkhand local languages, Hindi, English, and Bangla
